why: Adapted from a documented God Class refactoring in a public Java project.
source_notes: Adapted from the README-documented EdgeConvertGUI God Class refactoring.

why: Notification behavior is moved into a dedicated class, reducing the breadth of UserAdmin.
Reporting is extracted from inventory management so the class becomes more cohesive.
Several unrelated responsibilities are moved out to make the class smaller and more cohesive.
Extracting secondary concerns reduces class size and improves cohesion.
